title: Muhasebe Detay Raporu
description: Muhasebe fiş satırları — tüm besleyici tablolarla zenginleştirilmiş (hesap, cari, proje, departman, şube, çalışan, belge tipi, döviz kuru)

tenantBoundary.reason: Yearly partition rotation; schema name encodes year and tenant boundary

sourceQuery: SELECT AP.ACCOUNT_CODE, AP.ACCOUNT_NAME, ACR.CARD_ROW_ID, ACR.CARD_ID, CASE WHEN ACR.BA = 1 THEN N'Borç' WHEN ACR.BA = 0 THEN N'Alacak' ELSE N'Bilinmiyor' END AS BA, CASE WHEN ACR.BA = 1 THEN ABS(ACR.AMOUNT) WHEN ACR.BA = 0 THEN -ABS(ACR.AMOUNT) ELSE ACR.AMOUNT END AS AMOUNT, ACR.AMOUNT_CURRENCY, CASE WHEN ACR.BA = 1 THEN ABS(ACR.AMOUNT_2) WHEN ACR.BA = 0 THEN -ABS(ACR.AMOUNT_2) ELSE ACR.AMOUNT_2 END AS AMOUNT_2, ACR.AMOUNT_CURRENCY_2, ACR.DETAIL AS ROW_DETAIL, CASE WHEN ACR.BA = 1 THEN ABS(ACR.OTHER_AMOUNT) WHEN ACR.BA = 0 THEN -ABS(ACR.OTHER_AMOUNT) ELSE ACR.OTHER_AMOUNT END AS OTHER_AMOUNT, ACR.OTHER_CURRENCY, ACR.COST_PROFIT_CENTER, ACR.ACC_DEPARTMENT_ID, ACR.ACC_BRANCH_ID, ACR.ACC_PROJECT_ID, ACR.ACC_COMPANY_ID, ACR.ACC_CONSUMER_ID, ACR.RECORD_DATE, AC.ACTION_DATE, AC.ACTION_ID, AC.ACTION_TYPE, AC.CARD_TYPE, AC.CARD_DETAIL, AC.PAPER_NO, AC.BILL_NO, AC.IS_CANCEL, AC.ACC_EMPLOYEE_ID, AC.CARD_DOCUMENT_TYPE, AC.CARD_PAYMENT_METHOD, ISNULL(SPC.PROCESS_CAT, 'Diger') AS PROCESS_CAT_NAME, ISNULL(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(P.PROJECT_HEAD)), ''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS PROJECT_NAME, C.FULLNAME AS COMPANY_NAME, ISNULL(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(DEPT.DEPARTMENT_HEAD)), ''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, ISNULL(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(BR.BRANCH_NAME)), ''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS BRANCH_NAME, EMP.EMPLOYEE_NAME + ' ' + EMP.EMPLOYEE_SURNAME AS EMPLOYEE_FULLNAME, ISNULL(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(DT.DOCUMENT_TYPE_NAME)), ''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS DOCUMENT_TYPE_NAME, CONS.MEMBER_CODE AS CONSUMER_CODE, ACM_EUR.RATE2 AS EUR_RATE, ACM_USD.RATE2 AS USD_RATE, MH_EUR.RATEPP2 AS EUR_TCMB_RATE FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_ROWS] ACR WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_PLAN] AP WITH (NOLOCK) ON AP.ACCOUNT_CODE = ACR.ACCOUNT_ID AND AP.SUB_ACCOUNT = 0 LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD] AC WITH (NOLOCK) ON AC.CARD_ID = ACR.CARD_ID LEFT JOIN {tenantSetupProcessCatRelation} ON SPC.PROCESS_CAT_ID = AC.CARD_CAT_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[PRO_PROJECTS] P WITH (NOLOCK) ON P.PROJECT_ID = ACR.ACC_PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[COMPANY] C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.COMPANY_ID = AC.ACC_COMPANY_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[DEPARTMENT] DEPT WITH (NOLOCK) ON DEPT.DEPARTMENT_ID = ACR.ACC_DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[BRANCH] BR WITH (NOLOCK) ON BR.BRANCH_ID = ACR.ACC_BRANCH_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] EMP WITH (NOLOCK) ON EMP.EMPLOYEE_ID = AC.ACC_EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[SETUP_DOCUMENT_TYPE] DT WITH (NOLOCK) ON DT.DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID = AC.CARD_DOCUMENT_TYPE LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[CONSUMER] CONS WITH (NOLOCK) ON CONS.CONSUMER_ID = ACR.ACC_CONSUMER_ID LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_MONEY] ACM_EUR WITH (NOLOCK) ON ACM_EUR.ACTION_ID = AC.CARD_ID AND ACM_EUR.MONEY_TYPE = 'EUR' LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_MONEY] ACM_USD WITH (NOLOCK) ON ACM_USD.ACTION_ID = AC.CARD_ID AND ACM_USD.MONEY_TYPE = 'USD' LEFT JOIN (SELECT MONEY, RATEPP2, VALIDATE_DATE FROM (SELECT MONEY, RATEPP2, VALIDATE_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MONEY, VALIDATE_DATE ORDER BY MONEY_HISTORY_ID) AS RN FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[MONEY_HISTORY] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE MONEY = 'EUR') Sub WHERE RN = 1) MH_EUR ON MH_EUR.VALIDATE_DATE = AC.ACTION_DATE
